diff.description: Staged diff or change summary (the skill runs git diff --staged --stat itself when omitted)

breaking.description: Force the ! breaking-change marker and BREAKING CHANGE footer

message.description: Full commit message: <type>(<scope>): <subject> (subject <=50 chars, imperative, no trailing period), optional body wrapped at 72, footers per Conventional Commits 1.0.0. Never includes Co-authored-by: Claude or AI attribution.
